template_object.text-long:
TODO: Instruction: You are a CTI expert that gives precise and concise answers.

Question:  
Answer: Mitigation {coa:t.mitigates<.name} mitigates technique {t.name}.
template_object.text: Instruction: ... Question: .... Answer: Tool {tl:tool.name} uses technique {t1:tl.uses.name} (on Windows: platforms={t1.x_mitre_platforms[?='Windows']}) and technique {t2:tl.uses.name} (on Linux: platforms={t2.x_mitre_platforms[?='Linux']}), both mitigated by mitigations {coa1:t1.mitigates<.name} / {coa2:t2.mitigates<.name}.

query:
MATCH (tl:tool), (tl:tool)-[:uses]->(t1:`attack-pattern`), (t1:`attack-pattern`), (tl:tool)-[:uses]->(t2:`attack-pattern`), (t2:`attack-pattern`), (t1:`attack-pattern`)<-[:mitigates]-(coa1:`course-of-action`), (t2:`attack-pattern`)<-[:mitigates]-(coa2:`course-of-action`)
WHERE elementId(t1) <> elementId(t2) AND ("Windows" IN t1.x_mitre_platforms) AND ("Linux" IN t2.x_mitre_platforms)
LIMIT 10000
RETURN DISTINCT tl.name, t1.name, t1.x_mitre_platforms, t2.name, t2.x_mitre_platforms, coa1.name, coa2.name
ORDER BY rand()
